	{"bbox_2d": [115, 450, 257, 461], "text_content": "R = Paper/PE taping reel"},

	{"bbox_2d": [519, 323, 906, 350], "text_content": "The ordering code of a RC0805 chip resistor, value 56 Ω with ±1% tolerance, supplied in 7-inch tape reel is: RC0805FR-0756RL."},
	{"bbox_2d": [519, 383, 561, 393], "text_content": "NOTE"},
	{"bbox_2d": [519, 400, 900, 438], "text_content": "1. The “L” at the end of the code is only for ordering. On the reel label, the standard CTC will be mentioned an additional stamp “LFP”= lead free production."},
